title: GlossaryConcepts
description: Array of domain concepts to serialise as SKOS/RDF Turtle.

prefLabel.description: Preferred label of the concept, in the document language. Use the canonical form (e.g. infinitive for verbs, singular for nouns where appropriate).

altLabels.description: Synonyms, abbreviations, or variant spellings. May be empty.

definition.description: Short definition (1–2 sentences) derived from the document context. Empty string if not determinable.

broader.description: prefLabel of a broader (parent) concept within the same glossary. Leave out if unclear.

related.description: prefLabels of related concepts within the same glossary.

note.description: Optional scope note or usage remark.

examples.definition: Digitale Akte, die alle medizinischen Daten eines Patienten enthält.
Vorgang der Identitätsprüfung eines Nutzers oder Systems.
Eigenschaft einer Operation, die bei Mehrfachausführung dasselbe Ergebnis liefert wie bei Einfachausführung.
